---
title: "06: Logical Operators (Solutions)"
author: "Charlie Lindgren"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Solutions

```{r, eval=TRUE, echo=TRUE}
# Solution to Exercise 1
my_vector <- 1:10
print(my_vector)

# Solution to Exercise 2
my_vector[my_vector > 5]

# Solution to Exercise 3
my_vector[my_vector <= 3]

# Solution to Exercise 4
my_vector[my_vector > 3 & my_vector < 7]

# Solution to Exercise 5
my_fruits <- c("apple", "banana", "orange", "apple", "grape")
my_fruits[my_fruits == "apple"]

# Solution to Exercise 6
df <- data.frame(
  name = c("Alice", "Bob", "Charlie", "David"),
  age = c(24, 32, 28, 22)
)
df[df$age > 25, ]

# Solution to Exercise 7
df[df$age > 25, "name"]
```
